User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing settings and favorites

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

favoriteFolders.description: Array of folder IDs that the user has marked as favorites

favoriteEbooks.description: Array of ebook keys that the user has marked as favorites

darkMode.description: Whether the user has dark mode enabled

myMedicines.description: Array of the user's custom medicines

reminders.description: Map of user reminders from simple ebooks

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user preferences and custom saved favorites mapped by user UID
